positive: Minimalist, abstract geometric pattern featuring intertwined tropical leaves (monstera, palm, fern) forming a continuous, repeating jungle tapestry. The leaves should be rendered in a stylized, clean silhouette style, creating a high-contrast effect against a solid, pale cream background. Limited color palette of deep emerald green, teal blue, and charcoal black. Perfect symmetry, vector-art quality, scalable design, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, highly detailed line work, graphic design, modern botanical illustration. Clean lines, negative space emphasized. --ar 1:1 --v 5.1
